finding.summary: Stereo balance is strongly skewed left by 3.6 dB, causing an off-center image.
finding.probable_cause: The source recording likely has a channel-level mismatch. No FX are present, so the imbalance is in the raw audio.
finding.confidence_reason: silence fraction is very low (0.05) and capture isolation is verified; the balance measurement is reliable.

evidence_refs.description: Measured stereo balance difference, positive indicates left louder.

proposal.reason: The intrinsic stereo imbalance of 3.6 dB left-heavy can be compensated by panning slightly right in balance mode. A pan value of +0.258 approximates the required correction to equalize channel levels.
